phrases.intent_en: Where is the Minster tower ticket booth
phrases.cultural_note: Minster tower climb tickets are sold at the base of the Minster, typically under the main porch (Münsterportal).

phrases.intent_en: Where to split restaurant bill nearby
phrases.text_local: Wo kann ich die Rechnung teilen?
phrases.cultural_note: Many restaurants in Freiburg’s Old Town offer bill splitting upon request.

likely_response.translation_en: At the restaurants on Münster Square.

responses.english: At the restaurants on Münster Square.

phrases.intent_en: Where to find Bächle stream crossings
phrases.cultural_note: Bächle are shallow streams crossing streets in the Old Town. Look for small bridges or stone slabs for crossing.

phrases.intent_en: Where is Schwabentor gate from here
phrases.cultural_note: Schwabentor is one of the historic city gates marking the Old Town’s western edge.

phrases.intent_en: Which tram ticket machine near Martinstor
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Ticketautomat am Martinstor?
phrases.cultural_note: Tram ticket machines are located near major gates, often at the edge of the pedestrian zone.

likely_response.local: Suchen Sie den Automaten am Eingang.
likely_response.translation_en: Look for the machine at the gate entrance.

responses.english: Look for the machine at the gate entrance.
responses.local: Suchen Sie den Automaten am Eingang.
